title: Fix the eviction policy of an LRU cache
prompt: The `LRUCache` class in solution_stub.py is meant to be a least-recently-used cache. Constructor LRUCache(capacity). `get(key)` returns the value or -1 if absent. `put(key, value)` inserts/updates. When inserting beyond capacity, the LEAST recently used entry must be evicted. Both get and put count as a use, and updating an existing key also refreshes its recency. The current version evicts in insertion order (FIFO) and never refreshes recency on get or update. Fix it to be a correct LRU.
